creator: jonny@jonny.eng.br
text:
This small module implements the HTTP/1.1 PUT and DELETE methods.
Please notice that it can be a big security hole to activate them
without securing the web server.

WWW: http://hpwww.ec-lyon.fr/~vincent/apache/mod_put.html

Obs: I will let ports@freebsd.org be the MAINTAINER, as I have no
time to keep track of the source.  I just had the need for this, and
since there was no port, I made one.
